title: Import Multiples Project from Jira (Boards/JQL)
excerpt:
Hi, 
I trying to migrate boards or jql from jira to monday, but i cant do it. 
Does anyone know how I can solve this problem? 
Ex-import/migrate: 
Project in (Project1, Project2) and issuetype = epic
